findings: Found 2 new low-severity shared test-seed/runtime drift issues; skipped existing command/server/bootstrap drift duplicates already registered as ISS-20260608-001..049.

issues_found.title: Shared test seed reverses MCP payload guard boundary semantics
issues_found.description: docs/test-seed/shared.md says payloads exactly at the warn/hard thresholds belong to the warn/throw side (>=16K warn / >=64K throw), but the runtime uses strict greater-than checks and tests assert 16384 has no warning and 65536 does not throw; the integration test also has a stale summary comment that says the opposite of its own cases.
issues_found.fix_direction: Update shared.md I4/T3 and the stale boundary-test summary comment to state the current contract: bytes > warn emits warning, bytes > hard throws; equality stays on the safe side except 65536 still returns a warning because it is > warn.

issues_found.title: Shared test seed still advertises retired bootstrap-guide export and rule-test-index schema
issues_found.description: docs/test-seed/shared.md lists ./node/bootstrap-guide and packages/shared/src/node/bootstrap-guide.ts as current public surface and names rule-test-index in the schema set, but the actual package exports ./templates/bootstrap-canonical, the old bootstrap-guide file is absent, and current tests import knowledge-test-index/bootstrap-canonical instead.
issues_found.fix_direction: Refresh docs/test-seed/shared.md from packages/shared/package.json and current tests: replace bootstrap-guide with ./templates/bootstrap-canonical, replace rule-test-index with knowledge-test-index, and update source traceability paths.
